ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "unit_number" TEXT /* Unit number of the property */,
  "list_price" REAL /* Listed price of the property */,
  "bed_bath_count" TEXT /* Count of bedrooms and bathrooms (e.g., 2/2/0) */,
  "square_footage" INTEGER /* Total square footage of the property */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the property (e.g., listed, sold) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the property */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the property is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the property is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the property */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., single-family home, condo) */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent listing the property */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the listing was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the property */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL to a photo of the property */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities (e.g., pool, garage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property sold */,
  "sold_price" REAL /* Final sale price of the property */,
  "sold_dollars_per_sqft" REAL /* Sale price per square foot */,
  "closed_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction closed */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent handling the transaction */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buyer */,
  "list_date" TEXT /* Date when the property was listed */,
  "days_on_market" INTEGER /* Number of days the property was on the market before being sold */,
  "commission_rate" REAL /* Commission rate for the transaction */,
  "commission_amount" REAL /* Commission amount based on the final sale price */,
  "financing_type" TEXT /* Type of financing (e.g., cash, mortgage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES buyers ("buyer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Full name of the agent */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email contact for the agent */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Real estate license number of the agent */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the agent's office */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  "specializations" TEXT /* List of specializations (e.g., luxury properties, first-time buyers) */,
  "profile_photo_url" TEXT /* URL to a profile photo of the agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buyers" (
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each buyer */,
  "buyer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the buyer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email contact for the buyer */,
  "budget" REAL /* Maximum budget the buyer is willing to spend */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the buyer */,
  "preference_notes" TEXT /* Notes on buyer preferences and needs */,
  "last_visited" TEXT /* Date of the last property visit */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent assisting the buyer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("buyer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_buyers_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for the recorded market trends */,
  "average_list_price" REAL /* Average listing price across properties */,
  "average_sold_price" REAL /* Average sold price across properties */,
  "average_days_on_market" INTEGER /* Average number of days properties remained on the market */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region (e.g., city, neighborhood) */,
  "median_list_price" REAL /* Median listing price across properties */,
  "median_sold_price" REAL /* Median sold price across properties */,
  "median_days_on_market" INTEGER /* Median number of days properties remained on the market */,
  "inventory_count" INTEGER /* Number of properties on the market */,
  "price_change_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change in average prices compared to the previous period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property being reviewed */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the property (1 to 5) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buyer who wrote the review */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent associated with the property */,
  "visited_date" TEXT /* Date when the buyer visited the property */,
  "review_source" TEXT /* Source of the review (e.g., website, app) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES buyers ("buyer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "showings" (
  "showing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each showing */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property being shown */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the agent conducting the showing */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the buyer attending the showing */,
  "showing_date" TEXT /* Date of the showing */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the showing */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the showing */,
  "showing_notes" TEXT /* Notes taken during the showing */,
  "property_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the property during the showing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("showing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_showings_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_showings_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_showings_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES buyers ("buyer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_criteria" (
  "criteria_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search criteria */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the buyer who set the criteria */,
  "min_price" REAL /* Minimum price range for the search */,
  "max_price" REAL /* Maximum price range for the search */,
  "min_beds" INTEGER /* Minimum number of bedrooms */,
  "max_beds" INTEGER /* Maximum number of bedrooms */,
  "min_baths" INTEGER /* Minimum number of bathrooms */,
  "max_baths" INTEGER /* Maximum number of bathrooms */,
  "min_sqft" INTEGER /* Minimum square footage */,
  "max_sqft" INTEGER /* Maximum square footage */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., single-family home, condo) */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of desired amenities */,
  "location" TEXT /* Preferred location (e.g., city, neighborhood) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("criteria_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_criteria_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES buyers ("buyer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the buyer receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property related to the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., new listing, price drop) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, read) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES buyers ("buyer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., agent, buyer, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
